source: FDA 2024 ADC Guidance; Saber et al. 2015; ICH S6(R1); ICH S9
description: Common ADC effects shared across all payload classes. These arise from the antibody/Fc component (injection site reactions, ADA, infusion reactions) and from non-specific cytotoxic payload exposure (lymphoid depletion, body weight loss, thymus involution, testicular degeneration). Not user-selectable — serves as base for payload-specific overlay profiles.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate-severe necrosis, thrombosis, or tissue destruction = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Formulation components + minor extravasation + local Fc-mediated immune activation. Present in vehicle control groups; resolves during recovery.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: ADA with neutralizing capacity causing accelerated clearance and loss of exposure = study interpretation flag. Anaphylaxis = never reclassify.
expected_findings.rationale: Universal immunogenic response to humanized antibody in non-human species. High incidence in cynomolgus (60-100%). ICH S6(R1): not predictive of clinical immunogenicity.
expected_findings.pk_correlate: Total antibody AUC (ADA causes premature clearance)

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Marked depletion with loss of germinal centers or frank immunosuppression with opportunistic infection = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Cytotoxic payload effects on actively cycling lymphocytes + Fc-mediated B-cell depletion if CD target.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: >40% reduction with histopathological correlate of marked lymphoid depletion = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Loss of lymphoid mass from payload-mediated cytotoxicity of cycling splenic lymphocytes.

expected_findings.typical_magnitude: Up to 10% reduction from baseline; dose-proportional
expected_findings.severity_threshold: >15% reduction from baseline or moribundity = adverse. >10% without GI findings = adverse.
expected_findings.rationale: Anorexia (GI-mediated) + catabolic state from systemic cytotoxicity. Expected at all dose levels.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Severe involution with complete cortical loss or clinical immunodeficiency = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Cortical thymocyte cytotoxicity (rapidly dividing) + stress-induced cortisol-mediated involution.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Moderate-marked with complete tubular atrophy or Sertoli cell-only pattern = adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Rapidly dividing spermatogonia sensitive to all cytotoxic payload classes. Universal finding for cytotoxic ADCs; expected and accepted for oncology indications.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Anaphylaxis, cardiovascular compromise, or bronchospasm = never reclassify
expected_findings.rationale: Fc-mediated complement activation; cytokine release from Fc receptor-bearing cells. Transient first-dose effect.
